title: agrostis stolonifera f. diffusa
intro: Agrostis stolonifera f. diffusa, also known as creeping bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its chemical compounds such as phenolic acids and flavonoids. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for herbal remedies, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in pharmaceutical applications.
